foundation.reason: Matte foundations give you a smooth, shine-free base that photographs beautifully.

concealer.reason: Matte concealers set firmly and resist creasing throughout the day.

blush.reason: Matte blush gives you a natural-looking flush with lasting definition.

eyeshadow.reason: Matte eyeshadows are perfect for precise, sculpted eye looks.

lipstick.reason: Matte lipstick delivers bold, long-wearing colour that won't budge.

lip gloss.reason: A matte gloss offers a unique velvet finish — different from the typical shine.

mascara.reason: This mascara delivers defined lashes without clumping.

skincare.reason: Mattifying skincare helps control shine and keeps your base fresh all day.

other.reason: A matte finish gives you a polished, understated look.

foundation.reason: Dewy foundations give you that coveted glass-skin glow from within.

concealer.reason: A dewy concealer brightens and hydrates the under-eye area beautifully.

blush.reason: Dewy blush melts into your skin for a fresh, just-pinched flush.

eyeshadow.reason: Dewy eyeshadow gives your lids a luminous, editorial quality.

lipstick.reason: A dewy lip adds youthful moisture and light-catching dimension.

lip gloss.reason: Glossy, dewy finish on the lips is iconic — maximum shine and dimension.

mascara.reason: This mascara gives your lashes a healthy, glossy finish.

skincare.reason: Hydrating skincare is the perfect prep for your radiant glow.

other.reason: A dewy finish adds a youthful, hydrated quality to your look.

foundation.reason: Satin foundations give you the ideal balance — natural radiance without excess shine.

concealer.reason: A satin concealer blends seamlessly and looks like real skin.

blush.reason: Satin blush adds a soft, diffused glow to your cheeks.

eyeshadow.reason: Satin eyeshadow offers subtle dimension that flatters every eye shape.

lipstick.reason: Satin lipstick feels comfortable and gives your lips a luxurious finish.

lip gloss.reason: A satin gloss gives you shine without the stickiness — elegant and wearable.

mascara.reason: This mascara adds natural definition without being too dramatic.

skincare.reason: This skincare gives your complexion a smooth, satin-like quality.

other.reason: A satin finish is universally flattering and endlessly wearable.

foundation.reason: Shimmer in a base product can emphasise texture — best for evening looks.

concealer.reason: Shimmer concealers highlight and brighten but can settle into fine lines.

blush.reason: Shimmer blush gives you a lit-from-within glow on the high points of your cheeks.

eyeshadow.reason: Shimmer eyeshadow catches the light beautifully for glamorous, dimensional eyes.

lipstick.reason: A shimmer lipstick adds sparkle and dimension to your lips.

lip gloss.reason: Shimmer gloss gives your lips maximum sparkle and glass-like shine.

mascara.reason: Shimmer mascara is a fun statement piece for special occasions.

skincare.reason: Shimmer in skincare adds a subtle luminosity under or over makeup.

other.reason: Shimmer adds sparkle and dimension to your look.

foundation.reason: This foundation works with your natural skin to create a polished base.

concealer.reason: This concealer helps even out your complexion where you need it most.

blush.reason: This blush adds a beautiful flush of colour to your cheeks.

eyeshadow.reason: This eyeshadow complements your eye colour and personal style.

lipstick.reason: This lipstick adds colour and definition to your lips.

lip gloss.reason: This gloss gives your lips a beautiful, wearable finish.

mascara.reason: This mascara enhances your natural lash shape and length.

skincare.reason: This skincare product supports your skin's natural health and radiance.

other.reason: This product complements your personal style.
